action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 5 completed a stable 2-epoch DDP training run in ~762s (~12.7 min). Best validation mIoU was 0.3987. Training curves are empty, likely because metrics weren't logged with the expected keys/frequency. Before long training runs, I must validate the inference pipeline and get a real eval score. Analysis: The predict.py in workspace loads state_dict into a bare model before wrapping in DataParallel. If the DDP checkpoint was saved with model.state_dict() (includes 'module.' prefix), loading will crash. I need to make predict.py robust to this. Decision: Rewrite predict.py to strip 'module.' prefix if present, then run a local smoke-test on validation images. If successful, immediately submit eval to get the baseline score and measure eval throughput.
